svg.text: Reconstructed from the screenshot labels provided. Fair comparison uses the first 44 observed weeks for both communities.
Start points used: RISE Viera 7/22/2024 and Parasol Melbourne 4/24/2023.
Weekly bars show the relative intensity of leasing activity in the comparable first-year window.
This view makes the pace difference easier to see: Viera separates from Parasol early and stays ahead.
Use this as a directional call visual, not as a system-export exhibit. If you can pull the raw first-year lease export for both communities, I can replace the reconstruction with an exact chart.
